RemediationStrings.Title: SentinelOne Agent not installed
RemediationStrings.Description: The SentinelOne Agent service is not installed on this system. Please contact your IT support.

RemediationStrings.Title: SentinelOne Agent not running
RemediationStrings.Description: The SentinelOne Agent service is not running on this system. Please contact your IT support.

RemediationStrings.Title: SentinelOne Agent not starting automatically
RemediationStrings.Description: The SentinelOne Agent service is not configured to start automatically at system start on this system. Please contact your IT support.
